title: Compound V: Gone Viral
description: Adds the Supe Virus to Compound V
body:
On servers with the Compound V Mod, non-powered players don't stand much of a chance fighting against supes. This mod changes that!

 

Compound V: Gone Viral adds the Supe Virus, which infects mobs and players and harms anyone with Compound V in their system.

 

To make it, you must brew a wither skull into Compound V, and then a Nether Star (second step configurable) to obtain the virus. It can be brewed into more Compound V to replicate, and it can be made into Viral Arrows, which inflict the sickness from afar.

 

This whole mod is configurable, so you can determine how much damage it does, how long the infection lasts, and how it can be made.
